text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hey, check out that poster! "In just two days, the
floor magician finally appears among us!"
choice_data_list: Uhhh, I don't think it's what you're picturing...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Well, we won't know until we see! I want to meet
that magician! If I say we're going, we're going!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Remembering all the duds we went to before, I
can't help but think this one is going to turn out
the same. But...
choice_data_list: All right, let's check it out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If this is what she wants, then even if it isn't
magical, I want to take her and make sure she has
a good time!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! This place is crazy! All these people are
making so much noise, it's got my head spinning!
This must be one of the witch gatherings I've
heard so much about!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
And on top of that, it's a mystery when and where
the magician will appear! Isn't that so fitting for a
magician?! But I'm definitely gonna find them!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The magician will be making a surprise
appearance on a stage somewhere in the venue. I
imagine it will be somewhere everyone can see
them.
choice_data_list: Why don't we head toward the central sta—

text_block_list.name: MC
text_block_list.text:
Oh! It looks like we've got a surprise performance
near the entrance! The fresh new singer, Adam, is
taking the stage!

text_block_list.name: Cheerful Guy
text_block_list.text:
Where are you going?! You're gonna miss it!
Come on, let's run to the entrance together!
choice_data_list: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Where do you think you're going, Familiar?! I'm
gonna go to the central stage without you!

text_block_list.name: Cheerful Guy
text_block_list.text:
Wait, you're here to see the magician?! I assumed
you were here for Adam! My bad! Here, let me
give you some info...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Look who finally decided to show up! Aren't you a
lucky familiar, having a master like me who'll let
you get away with making me wait?
choice_data_list: I got some info on the magician!
I got some info on the magician!

text_block_list.name: Boisterous Audience
text_block_list.text:
Yay! Let's make some noooise!
This is awesome!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
WHAT ARE YOU SAYING? I CAN'T HEAR
ANYTHING!
choice_data_list: A-anyway, let's go this way!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. So this is where the magician is gonna be?
Well, I do see some people that look like staff
walking around!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Cough, cough... Ugh, I might have hurt my throat yelling earlier. I hope I can still talk to the magician...
choice_data_list: I'll get you a drink!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Yummy! ♪ Good work, Familiar! All we need is
the magician and everything'll be perfect!

text_block_list.name: Audience
text_block_list.text:
The magician is gonna come from over here! Let's
get closer to the fron—oh no!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thud! Splash!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Ah! My limited edition drink! And my favorite
socks!
choice_data_list: I-I'll get them cleaned up right away!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Are you serious?! The magician finished while we
were cleaning my socks?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, this outing also ends in failure. Worst of
all, Sweep Tosho chose the event herself this
time.
choice_data_list: ...Sorry. All I do is mess things up.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
...
Ugh!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Seriously, what are we gonna do with you? You
mess up once, and then you start tripping all over
yourself. You've got no spine!
choice_data_list: Ouch...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: How can you think this was a failure?!
choice_data_list: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Listen here. You're like the poster child of a
brand-new familiar! Don't you get that?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You're not a genius magical girl like me. You can't
expect to be perfect!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
And even I wasn't always like this. Why, way back
when...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Cough, cough, cough! Ugh! Why did the pot explode like that?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
That was quite a show! But it's okay. As long as
you aren't hurt, everything is fine.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
It's not fine at all! All the ingredients have gone
to waste. I even burnt the pot...

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
Now that you know that can happen, you'll be
more careful next time. Right?

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
That's how everyone improves. You didn't fail.
You're building a foundation for success!

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
There's no need to be upset. Just keep building
that foundation!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Granny told me there's no such thing as failure,
and I think she was right about that.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: It's the same for you!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Last time, you just believed anyone who said
magic was involved, but you took that mistake to
heart and really looked into things this time!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
...Sure, you didn't really handle things very well at
the witch gathering, but now you've learned and
can do better next time!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You worked hard and you've made a lot of
progress as a familiar!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Now, keep up the good work and no slacking off!
That's what I need from a familiar!
choice_data_list: Thank you for saying that!
So you've noticed how hard I've been working?
So you've noticed how hard I've been working?
I'm gonna be the best familiar ever!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Now, keep up the good work and no slacking off!
That's what I need from a familiar!
choice_data_list: Thank you for saying that!
So you've noticed how hard I've been working?
So you've noticed how hard I've been working?
I'm gonna be the best familiar ever!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hey now, don't start celebrating just yet! I'm not
saying that I'm satisfied.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... I'm hungry, so go find me something
sweet! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho has a big grin on her face. I promise
her that I'll keep working hard to make her happy.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
It's not like I've been watching you! I just
happened to notice you looking all panicked and
mopey is all!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Anyways! You're my familiar, so no more looking
pathetic or I'll punish you with magic next time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She doesn't like to show it, but she does care.
Knowing that fills me with joy and warms my
heart.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: That's the spirit! Nice to see you motivated!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
All righty, then! I want you to be the strongest
familiar ever, so I can brag about you to all the
other witches!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Someday you'll be known as Great Witch
Sweepy's familiar!
